steps.title: Identify the added function
steps.content: The first sentence says guard cells help regulate how much carbon dioxide a plant takes in. The next sentence adds another function: they also help regulate water loss.

steps.title: Choose an additive transition
steps.content: Choice A signals time, not a second function. Choice C signals a conclusion, but the passage is not summarizing an argument. Choice D signals replacement or contrast, even though both functions are true. An additive transition fits. The answer is B.
